nodes.name: Meridian Steel Works
nodes.text: Meridian Steel Works is a Tier-1 supplier of structural steel and aluminum alloys based in Duisburg, Germany. Long-standing supplier with high reliability.

nodes.name: Pacific Rubber Co
nodes.text: Pacific Rubber Co supplies synthetic rubber compounds for gaskets and seals, based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. Tier-2 supplier feeding into component makers.

nodes.name: Andes Lithium Group
nodes.text: Andes Lithium Group mines and refines lithium carbonate for battery production, based in Antofagasta, Chile. Subject to periodic export regulation changes.

nodes.name: Nexon Circuits
nodes.text: Nexon Circuits is a Tier-1 semiconductor and PCB supplier based in Hsinchu, Taiwan. Supplies control boards to multiple product lines. Located in a typhoon-prone coastal region.

nodes.name: Baltic Glass Industries
nodes.text: Baltic Glass Industries manufactures tempered glass components, based in Gdansk, Poland. Tier-2 supplier with stable output.

nodes.name: Sahara Solar Materials
nodes.text: Sahara Solar Materials produces photovoltaic-grade silicon wafers, based in Casablanca, Morocco. Growing supplier for renewable energy product lines.

nodes.name: Nippon Precision Motors
nodes.text: Nippon Precision Motors manufactures high-precision electric motors, based in Nagoya, Japan. Tier-1 supplier known for exceptional quality control.

nodes.name: Coastal Plastics Ltd
nodes.text: Coastal Plastics Ltd molds injection-plastic housings and enclosures, based in Penang, Malaysia. Operates near the Port of Penang.

nodes.name: Structural Steel Frame
nodes.text: Structural Steel Frame: load-bearing chassis frame made of high-tensile steel.

nodes.name: Rubber Gasket Seal
nodes.text: Rubber Gasket Seal: weatherproof synthetic rubber sealing component.

nodes.name: Lithium Battery Cell
nodes.text: Lithium Battery Cell: rechargeable cell used in battery packs.

nodes.name: Control Board PCB
nodes.text: Control Board PCB: main logic board with embedded microcontroller.

nodes.name: Tempered Glass Panel
nodes.text: Tempered Glass Panel: impact-resistant glass panel for display housings.

nodes.name: Photovoltaic Wafer
nodes.text: Photovoltaic Wafer: silicon wafer used in solar charging modules.

nodes.name: Precision Drive Motor
nodes.text: Precision Drive Motor: brushless electric motor for mechanical actuation.

nodes.name: Injection-Molded Housing
nodes.text: Injection-Molded Housing: outer plastic casing for device enclosures.

nodes.name: Sensor Array Module
nodes.text: Sensor Array Module: multi-sensor board manufactured alongside control boards.

nodes.name: SolarCharge Portable Panel
nodes.text: SolarCharge Portable Panel: a foldable consumer solar charging device.

nodes.name: UrbanMove E-Scooter
nodes.text: UrbanMove E-Scooter: an electric scooter for last-mile urban transport.

nodes.name: HomeGuard Security Camera
nodes.text: HomeGuard Security Camera: a smart home security camera with onboard sensors.

nodes.name: PowerCell Battery Pack
nodes.text: PowerCell Battery Pack: a modular rechargeable battery pack for tools and devices.

nodes.name: IndustriBot Actuator Arm
nodes.text: IndustriBot Actuator Arm: a robotic arm module used in factory automation.

nodes.name: Rotterdam Assembly Plant
nodes.text: Rotterdam Assembly Plant: primary European assembly facility for mobility and robotics product lines.

nodes.name: Shenzhen Electronics Plant
nodes.text: Shenzhen Electronics Plant: high-volume electronics assembly facility in Guangdong province.

nodes.name: Austin Solar Fabrication
nodes.text: Austin Solar Fabrication: dedicated fabrication line for solar charging products.

nodes.name: Rotterdam Central Warehouse
nodes.text: Rotterdam Central Warehouse: regional storage hub for European-assembled goods.

nodes.name: Shenzhen Regional Warehouse
nodes.text: Shenzhen Regional Warehouse: storage and export hub for electronics products.

nodes.name: Austin Distribution Warehouse
nodes.text: Austin Distribution Warehouse: storage hub for solar product exports.

nodes.name: North America DC
nodes.text: North America DC: final-mile distribution center serving US and Canada retailers.

nodes.name: Europe DC
nodes.text: Europe DC: final-mile distribution center serving EU retailers.

nodes.name: APAC DC
nodes.text: APAC DC: final-mile distribution center serving Asia-Pacific retailers.

nodes.name: GreenGrid Retail
nodes.text: GreenGrid Retail: large US retail chain carrying solar and battery products.

nodes.name: UrbanTransit GmbH
nodes.text: UrbanTransit GmbH: European mobility fleet operator purchasing e-scooters.

nodes.name: SecureHome Asia
nodes.text: SecureHome Asia: APAC smart-home distributor carrying security cameras.

nodes.name: FactoryTech Automation
nodes.text: FactoryTech Automation: industrial automation integrator purchasing robotic arms.

nodes.name: shipment_001
nodes.text: Shipment of control board PCBs from Nexon Circuits to Rotterdam Assembly Plant, currently delayed.

nodes.name: shipment_002
nodes.text: Shipment of lithium battery cells from Andes Lithium Group to Shenzhen Electronics Plant, currently in transit.

nodes.name: shipment_003
nodes.text: Shipment of finished goods from Shenzhen Regional Warehouse to North America DC, delayed due to a port strike.

nodes.name: shipment_004
nodes.text: Shipment of photovoltaic wafers from Sahara Solar Materials to Austin Solar Fabrication, on schedule.

nodes.name: Typhoon near Hsinchu, Taiwan
nodes.text: A category-4 typhoon is forecast to make landfall near Hsinchu, Taiwan within 72 hours, threatening operations at semiconductor and PCB suppliers in the region, including Nexon Circuits.

nodes.name: Port of Shenzhen labor strike
nodes.text: A labor strike at the Port of Shenzhen is delaying outbound container shipments from the Shenzhen Regional Warehouse by an estimated 5-7 days.

nodes.name: Chilean lithium export quota change
nodes.text: Chile has announced new export quotas on lithium carbonate, potentially constraining supply from Andes Lithium Group over the next quarter.
